headline: CT company’s massive suburban office complex sold. For a sliver of $150M it cost to build
summary: A massive suburban office complex — once a major satellite location for one of the area’s most recognized employers — has sold for a stunning 5% of the nearly $150 million it cost to build in the late 2000s and represents a further sign of the depth of the office property woes in the region. The Hartford Insurance Group sold its complex in Windsor, off Day Hill Road, for $7.5 million this ...
